incorrects.description: Student did not correctly place all four bars on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Check the data table values and where each bar should end.

incorrects.description: Student did not correctly place all four bars on second attempt

params.description: Markers and Paintbrushes highlight on the axis, showing they should align with lines at 30 and 20.

steps.text: Markers is 30, right at a line. Paintbrushes is 20, also at a line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Where does each bar end?

incorrects.description: Student did not correctly place all four bars. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets all four bars: Markers at 30, Crayons at 45, Paintbrushes at 20, Glue Sticks at 55.

steps.text: Let me show you. Markers is 30, right at the 30 line. Crayons is 45, halfway between 40 and 50. Paintbrushes is 20, at the 20 line. Glue Sticks is 55, halfway between 50 and 60. Some bars end at the lines. Some end between the lines. The correct graph shows all four values from the data table.
